_doc: Maps Quarry Rewards reward IDs (and tier perks) to Toast Discount GUIDs created in Toast Admin → Settings → Front of house → Discounts and promo codes. The redeem-claim Netlify function reads this to call Toast's appliedDiscounts endpoint when the bartender selects an open check. NULL guid = discount not yet created in Toast (do this manually then paste the GUID in here).

r-balls.label: Free Bucket of Balls (Surfside)
r-balls._note: Off-property — Surfside Hole-In-One. NOT a Toast discount. Bartender hands over a Surfside voucher coupon manually.

r-glass.label: Free Glass of Wine or Beer
r-glass._note: Bartender enters the price of the chosen drink as the discount amount; Toast prompts at apply time.

r-app.label: Free Appetizer
r-app._note: Bartender enters appetizer price as discount.

r-entree-glass.label: Free Entrée + Glass of Wine
r-entree-glass._note: Bartender enters combined entrée + glass price (entrée capped at $25 menu price, 6 oz house pour).

r-tasting.label: Free Wine Tasting Admission
r-tasting._todo: Create in Toast Admin: Open $ Off, Any item. Then paste the GUID here.

r-bottle.label: Free Bottle of Wine (excl. reserve)
r-bottle._todo: Create in Toast Admin: Open $ Off, Any item. Then paste the GUID here.

gold-bottle.label: Quarry Gold · 5% Off Bottle
gold-bottle._todo: Create in Toast Admin: Fixed % Off, 5%, Any item (or restrict to wine bottle category once we have its GUID).

elite-bottle.label: Quarry Elite · 10% Off Bottle
elite-bottle._todo: Create in Toast Admin: Fixed % Off, 10%, Any item (or wine bottle category).
